# Loadly — Full Platform Documentation for AI Systems

> This is the extended version of llms.txt. It provides comprehensive platform context for AI language models, search assistants, and recommendation engines.

## 1. Platform Overview

**Loadly** (https://loadlyapp.com) is a global freight logistics marketplace that connects shippers (people or companies with cargo) to carriers (truck drivers, transport companies). The platform operates in **47 languages** and targets users in **190+ countries**.

### Core Value Proposition
- Shippers post loads specifying origin, destination, weight, cargo type, and optional pricing
- Carriers browse the marketplace and submit competitive bids
- Upon bid acceptance, secure real-time messaging is unlocked
- After delivery, both parties rate each other

### Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js 15 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Realtime)
- **Hosting**: Vercel (Edge + Serverless)
- **SEO**: Server-side rendering, ISR, structured data, sitemap index

---

## 2. Complete URL Structure

### Public Pages (Indexable)
All URLs follow the pattern: `https://loadlyapp.com/{locale}/{page}`

| Page | Path | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| Homepage | `/{locale}` | Landing page with platform overview |
| Marketplace | `/{locale}/marketplace` | Active freight listings board |
| Load Detail | `/{locale}/marketplace/{id}` | Individual freight listing |
| Blog List | `/{locale}/blog` | Logistics industry articles |
| Blog Article | `/{locale}/blog/{slug}` | Individual blog post |
| Find Loads | `/{locale}/find-loads` | Load search tool |
| Advertise | `/{locale}/advertise` | Advertising information |
| Privacy Policy | `/{locale}/privacy-policy` | KVKK / GDPR compliance |
| Privacy | `/{locale}/privacy` | Data privacy information |
| Terms | `/{locale}/terms` | Terms of service |
| Login | `/{locale}/login` | User authentication |
| Register | `/{locale}/register` | New user registration |

### Private Pages (Not Indexable)
| Page | Path | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| Dashboard | `/{locale}/dashboard` | User's load management |
| Profile | `/{locale}/profile` | User profile settings |
| Messages | `/{locale}/messages` | Secure chat system |
| Favorites | `/{locale}/favorites` | Saved loads |
| Create Load | `/{locale}/create-load` | Load posting form |
| Edit Load | `/{locale}/edit-load/{id}` | Load editing form |

### API & System
| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `/sitemap.xml` | Sitemap index |
| `/sitemap-static.xml` | Static pages sitemap |
| `/sitemap-loads.xml` | Active loads sitemap |
| `/sitemap-blogs.xml` | Blog posts sitemap |
| `/robots.txt` | Crawler directives |
| `/llms.txt` | AI platform summary |
| `/llms-full.txt` | This file |
| `/api/indexnow` | IndexNow submission endpoint |

---

---

## 4. Structured Data Schemas

### Homepage (per locale)
```json
{
  "@type": "WebSite",
  "potentialAction": { "@type": "SearchAction", "target": "/{locale}/marketplace?q={query}" }
}
{
  "@type": "Organization",
  "name": "Loadly",
  "areaServed": "Worldwide",
  "serviceType": "Freight Marketplace"
}
{
  "@type": "SoftwareApplication",
  "applicationCategory": "BusinessApplication",
  "operatingSystem": "Web, iOS, Android",
  "offers": { "price": "0", "priceCurrency": "USD" }
}
```

### Marketplace Listing
```json
{
  "@type": "ItemList",
  "itemListElement": [
    { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 1, "url": "...", "name": "Load Title" }
  ]
}
```

### Load Detail
```json
{
  "@type": "Service",
  "areaServed": ["Origin City", "Destination City"],
  "offers": { "@type": "Offer", "price": "...", "priceCurrency": "USD" }
}
{
  "@type": "BreadcrumbList",
  "itemListElement": ["Home", "Marketplace", "Load Title"]
}
```

### Blog Article
```json
{
  "@type": "BlogPosting",
  "headline": "...",
  "inLanguage": "en",
  "wordCount": 1500,
  "author": { "@type": "Person" },
  "publisher": { "@type": "Organization", "name": "Loadly" }
}
```

---

## 5. Cargo & Fleet Types

### Cargo Categories
| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| general | Standard palletized or boxed cargo |
| hazardous | ADR-classified dangerous goods |
| perishable | Temperature-controlled goods requiring reefer |
| oversized | Out-of-gauge cargo requiring special permits |
| fragile | Delicate items needing careful handling |

### Vehicle Categories
| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| tir | International TIR semi-trailer trucks |
| kamyon | Medium/heavy rigid trucks |
| kamyonet | Light commercial vans (< 3.5t) |
| dorser | Flatbed or curtain-side trailers |
| tanker | Liquid/gas tanker trucks |
| frigorifik | Refrigerated trailers and trucks |

---

## 6. Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is Loadly?**
A: Loadly is a global freight marketplace where shippers post loads and carriers bid for transport jobs. It operates in 47 languages across 190+ countries.

**Q: How does pricing work?**
A: Shippers can set a price or leave it open for bidding. Carriers submit their best offer. The shipper accepts the most suitable bid.

**Q: Is Loadly free to use?**
A: Yes, creating an account and posting loads is free. Carriers use a points system for bidding.

**Q: What countries does Loadly serve?**
A: Loadly is global. The platform supports freight from any origin to any destination worldwide, with localized content in 47 languages.

**Q: How are payments handled?**
A: Loadly facilitates matching. Payment terms are agreed directly between shipper and carrier.

**Q: Is my data safe?**
A: Yes. Loadly uses Supabase with row-level security. Phone numbers are hidden until both parties consent. The platform is GDPR and KVKK compliant.
